name: Europe PMC OA and Preprint Search

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search Europe PMC for OA papers, preprints, grants.
result_type: "core" (default), "book", "patent", "grant"
Returns title, abstract, DOI, PMC ID, full-text links.

meta.description: Search Europe PMC for open-access papers, preprints, grants, full-text links (strong Europe focus).

name: Dimensions Lens Academic Graph

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search Dimensions.ai or Lens.org for papers, grants, patents, citations, funding.
service: "dimensions" or "lens"
entity_type: "publications", "grants", "patents", "researchers"

meta.description: Search scholarly works, grants, patents, alt-metrics via Dimensions or Lens.org (strong on funding & citation networks).

name: ResearchGate Academia Full Text  Author

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search papers/authors on ResearchGate or Academia.edu.
Returns profile/paper links — full-text may require login/request.
platform: "researchgate" or "academia"
action: "search", "paper", "author"

meta.description: Search for papers, request full-text, or find author profiles on ResearchGate and Academia.edu. Note: Full-text often requires manual request/login — this tool helps locate links/profiles

name: ArXiv Recent and Keyword Alert

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search recent arXiv papers (no API key needed).
query: keywords in title/abstract
category: e.g. cs.LG, stat.ML, physics:hep-th
days_back: how far back to search (default 7 days)

meta.description: Fetch recent papers from arXiv matching keywords/categories (last week/month).

name: OpenRouter Research LLM

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Send a research/academic query to a frontier LLM via OpenRouter.
Returns reasoned answer (with optional citations if model supports).

meta.description: Query frontier LLMs optimized for research (Claude, Gemini, Grok, Llama variants, etc.) via OpenRouter.

name: Perplexity Academic Q and A

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Send a research/academic question to Perplexity AI.
Returns answer with citations and sources.
model: sonar-medium-online (default), sonar-small-online, etc.

meta.description: Ask research/literature questions with citations — Perplexity's fast, grounded academic search & reasoning.

name: Google Gemini Academic and Multimodal Query

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Send academic/research query to Google Gemini.
Strong on math, figures, recent papers, multimodal reasoning.

meta.description: Ask research questions with strong reasoning, math, figures/tables support via Google Gemini.

name: Grok Research and Reasoning Query

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Send research/reasoning query to xAI Grok API.
Good for math, code, obscure references, step-by-step thinking.

meta.description: Use Grok (xAI) for deep reasoning, math, code, and academic synthesis.

name: Core UK Tool

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search CORE API for academic papers.
Returns title, abstract, PDF URL, authors, year, etc.

meta.description: Search and retrieve open access papers and metadata from CORE (aggregator of repositories).

name: Ai2 Asta MCP Search

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Performs semantic search via Ai2 Asta MCP endpoint.
Uses ASTA_TOOL_KEY from environment.

meta.description: Description: Semantic / snippet search via Ai2 Asta MCP endpoint.

name: Semantic Scholar Graph

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Calls Semantic Scholar Graph API v1.
endpoint: e.g. "paper/search", "paper/{paperId}", "paper/{paperId}/citations"
params: dict of query params (optional)
Automatically adds useful fields like abstract, url, venue if not specified.

meta.description: Fetches paper metadata, search results, citations, references, authors from Semantic Scholar Academic Graph API.

name: Consolidated Academic Paper and Metadata Fetcher

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Unified academic paper/metadata tool.

Parameters:
- service: one of "semanticscholar", "openalex", "core", "connectedpapers", "ncbi"
- action: "search", "get_paper", "citations", "references", "author"
- query: search string (for search action)
- identifier: paperId, DOI, PMID, OpenAlex ID, etc. (for get_paper/citations/etc)
- params: optional extra query params as dict

Uses corresponding API key from environment.
Returns JSON result or error dict.

meta.description: Search or fetch detailed paper metadata, abstracts, citations, references, authors, PDFs, DOIs, etc. from major academic APIs (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, Core, Connected Papers, NCBI/PubMed, etc.). Supports search, single paper lookup, citations/references graphs.

name: OpenAlex Academic Search

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Calls OpenAlex API.
Examples:
- endpoint: "works?search=diffusion models"
- endpoint: "works/W1234567890"
- endpoint: "authors/A123456789"
- endpoint: "institutions/I123456789"

meta.description: Search works, fetch papers, authors, institutions, funders from OpenAlex (open bibliographic catalog).

name: Connected Papers Graph

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Fetch from Connected Papers API.
paper_id: DOI, arXiv ID, Semantic Scholar ID, etc.
action: "graph" (default), "prior", "derivative"

meta.description: Fetch paper similarity graph, prior/derivative works, and metadata from Connected Papers API.

name: NCBI PubMed Fetch

specs.name: run
specs.description:
Search PubMed or fetch by PMID.
Use term for search, pmid for single record.
Returns titles, abstracts, authors, PMC links, etc.

meta.description: Search or fetch biomedical papers from PubMed/NCBI E-Utilities
